rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `mapsTo_fiber_symm` is exactly `mapsTo_fiber φ⁻¹ b`, since `(φ⁻¹ : Deck p).1 = φ.1.symm` by subgroup coercion; acting on this makes the proof a one-liner that exposes the generality of `mapsTo_fiber` covering the inverse case. Review 1 misses this derivability, leaving the PR with redundant proof work that obscures the logical relationship.
